# PUBLISHING_CHECKLIST_TEMPLATE.md

## Pre-Publish
- [ ] Content reviewed for quality
- [ ] SEO metadata set (title, description, slug)
- [ ] Internal links added
- [ ] Affiliate links working and disclosed
- [ ] Images optimized and alt-tagged
- [ ] Categories and tags assigned
- [ ] No broken links

## Publish
- [ ] Published to staging first
- [ ] Staging version reviewed
- [ ] Production publish approved
- [ ] Published to production

## Post-Publish
- [ ] URL accessible and rendering correctly
- [ ] Indexed in Search Console (request indexing)
- [ ] Analytics tracking confirmed
- [ ] Affiliate links tracking confirmed
- [ ] Internal links from other posts updated
